config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because once the state or the majority can override rights too easily, abuse becomes very likely. In my view, individual rights are the limit that keeps society fair, especially for minorities and unpopular people. Society matters a lot, but it should be pursued without treating the individual as disposable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh diberi prioritas mutlak di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman dan nilai yang sering ditekankan di Amerika Serikat, hak individu justru menjadi pagar utama agar mayoritas atau negara tidak sewenang-wenang terhadap kelompok kecil atau orang yang tidak populer. Saya juga tidak setuju dengan gagasan bahwa demi “kebaikan bersama” kita boleh dengan mudah mengorbankan kebebasan dasar, karena sejarah menunjukkan alasan itu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Yang lebih masuk akal adalah menyeimbangkan keduanya, dengan hak individu sebagai batas yang tidak boleh dilanggar sembarangan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Society should not have automatic priority over individual rights, because in practice that often becomes an excuse for the majority or the state to silence people. From my perspective in Indonesia, I understand the appeal of collectivism and social harmony, but I have also seen how easily “public interest” can be used to justify unfair treatment, especially toward minorities or people without power. Individual rights should be the boundary that society cannot cross, even when the goal sounds noble. Society matters, but it should be built by protecting people, not by treating the person as secondary.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu secara umum, karena di Amerika Serikat saya melihat hak individu sebagai rem paling penting terhadap kekuasaan yang kebablasan. Memang ada situasi tertentu, seperti keselamatan publik atau darurat kesehatan, ketika pembatasan terbatas bisa dibenarkan, tetapi itu harus sangat sempit, transparan, dan tidak menghapus hak dasar. Saya juga setuju dengan poin bahwa alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan terhadap minoritas atau orang yang tidak populer. Jadi, bagi saya, masyarakat penting, tetapi justru masyarakat yang sehat adalah masyarakat yang paling serius melindungi individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take priority over individual rights as a general rule. From my perspective in Indonesia, I understand why people value harmony and the common good, but I have seen how “for society” can become a convenient excuse for officials or majorities to ignore weaker voices, especially minorities. Public safety and emergency measures can justify limited restrictions, but only if they are narrow, accountable, and temporary. If individual rights are treated as secondary, society stops being fair and starts becoming dangerous for the people with the least power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena di Amerika Serikat saya melihat hak individu sebagai batas utama yang mencegah mayoritas atau negara bertindak sewenang-wenang. Poin tentang kepentingan publik dan keadaan darurat memang valid, tetapi justru pengecualian itulah yang harus dibatasi ketat, diawasi, dan tidak dipakai untuk menggerus hak dasar. Saya juga tidak percaya bahwa “demi masyarakat” otomatis lebih bermoral; sejarah sering menunjukkan bahwa alasan itu dipakai untuk membungkam minoritas dan orang yang tidak populer. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling serius melindungi martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
